Filippino Lippi

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
St. Jerome in His Study
by Filippino Lippi
Italy, 15th century · c. 1490 · pen and brown ink over traces of black chalk(?), with brush and brown wash, heightened with lead white; pricked
The Holy Family with Saint John the Baptist and Saint Margaret
by Filippino Lippi
Italy · c. 1488–93 · tempera and oil on wood
←After a cartoon by Lorenzo Lippi Fra Filippo Lippi→
